title: FriendlyFreecam
description:
This mod is a fork of the original Freecam mod.
The collision settings have been removed to ensure more legitimate gameplay while still allowing players to freely move the camera for recording, building, or exploring.
body:
This mod is a **fork** of the Freecam mod with the collision settings removed.

It allows the camera to move freely while the player remains in the original position, similar to the original Freecam functionality. The removed collision settings prevent the camera from bypassing blocks.

The mod is intended for legitimate gameplay use cases, such as inspecting builds or recording footage, without providing collision-related advantages.
